mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM loan_record
AND status = #{status}

SELECT lr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName, su.real_name AS borrowerName FROM loan_record lr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON lr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON lr.borrower_id = su.id WHERE lr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT lr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName, su.real_name AS borrowerName FROM loan_record lr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON lr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON lr.borrower_id = su.id WHERE lr.status = #{status} ORDER BY lr.id DESC

SELECT lr.*, cr.relic_name AS relicName, su.real_name AS borrowerName FROM loan_record lr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON lr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON lr.borrower_id = su.id ORDER BY lr.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_record (relic_id, borrower_id, borrower_unit, borrower_phone, loan_date, expected_return_date, actual_return_date, purpose, status, approver_name, approve_time, approve_remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{relicId}, #{borrowerId}, #{borrowerUnit}, #{borrowerPhone}, #{loanDate}, #{expectedReturnDate}, #{actualReturnDate}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{approverName}, #{approveTime}, #{approveRemark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
